title: A Resolution approving and adopting the Municipal Disaster Risk Reduction and Management Council (MDRRMC) Resolution No. 2025-04 dated July 25, 2025 entitled "Resolution Approving the Supplemental Investment Plan for the 5% Municipal Disaster Risk Reduction and Management Fund CY 2025-30% quick response fund amounting to Seven Million Seven Hundred Fifty-One Thousand Four Hundred Forty-Five Pesos and 68/100 (Php 7,751,445.68)."
